_comment: Phase SL.NEXT (2026-07-05) — routing policy for the harness incident digest. Lanes: 'content' = fix is likely wisdom/prompt/threshold content (draft via LEARN proposal pipeline); 'skeleton' = fix likely needs a Swift change (emit an improvement report with evidence). Kinds are the call-site strings recorded by HarnessIncidentLedger; unknown kinds take default_lane.

content_hints.delivery-audit-failed: wisdom/packs/universal.json — strengthen wiring/verification rules (see u-032/u-033); if one artifact family dominates the cluster, add a pack-specific rule instead.
content_hints.autofix-progress-stalled: harness/routing/escalation-thresholds.json + wisdom packs — auto-fix loops that stall usually mean the fix prompt lacks the failing context; consider a rule about reading render-gate errors before patching.
